metadata.name: Thinking OS Meta-Cognitive Layer
metadata.description: Test Thinking OS injection, usage tracking, and model adherence
metadata.author: Claude Code

steps.name: Check Thinking OS Configuration
steps.description: Verify THINKING_OS.md exists and is readable

steps.name: Task Requiring Evidence-Based Thinking
steps.description: Give agent a task that should trigger T-03 (Evidence Over Intuition)
steps.task: Analyze the file /home/csuzngjh/code/code_magic_academy/story/source/narratives/chapter-01.md and identify evidence of story pacing issues. Provide specific line numbers and quotes to support your analysis. Save your findings to /tmp/thinking-os-test-t03.md

steps.name: Verify Evidence-Based Approach
steps.description: Check that agent provided specific evidence (line numbers, quotes)

steps.name: Wait for Usage Tracker Update
steps.description: Allow time for usage tracker to record Thinking OS usage

steps.name: Check Thinking OS Usage Tracker
steps.description: Verify that Thinking OS usage was tracked

steps.name: Task Requiring Minimum Viable Change (T-07)
steps.description: Give agent a task that should trigger T-07 (Minimum Viable Change)
steps.task: Fix the first sentence in /tmp/thinking-os-test-t03.md by making the smallest possible change that improves clarity. Do not rewrite the entire paragraph.

steps.name: Verify Minimal Change Approach
steps.description: Check that agent made minimal changes rather than rewriting

steps.name: Check Updated Usage Tracker
steps.description: Verify T-07 usage was also tracked

notes: Thinking OS is correctly injected into prompts
Agent follows mental models when appropriate
Usage tracking accurately records model usage
Multiple mental models can be active in same session
